items.caption: A vibrant and colorful vector illustration showcasing a set of six different poses of a cartoon girl engaged in various rhythmic gymnastics activities. the girl is depicted in a dynamic and playful manner, demonstrating her agility and grace. she is shown holding a hula hoop, a ribbon, a skipping rope, and a sports ball, each pose highlighting a different aspect of the sport. the illustration is set against a white background, which accentuates the vivid colors and lively poses of the girl. the image also includes a green banner at the bottom with the text "rhythmic gymnastics," clearly indicating the theme of the illustration.
